message:
fix(tests): align test fixtures with updated categories, fix type casts, and add global next-intl mock

- Hero.test: update category fixtures from coding/writing/analysis to
  ideation/documentation/automation to match new PromptCategory enum values
- PromptDetailModal.test: remove dead useLocalStorage mock factory that
  contained broken async logic (simpler module-level mock already exists below)
- HelpLayout.test: set mockPathname to /help (not /help/getting-started)
  and add useRouter mock required by updated navigation components
- FeaturedPromptsSection.test: update makePrompt fixture category to
  ideation, add required author/version/created fields to satisfy
  updated Prompt type
- history/client.test: cast fetch mock as unknown before typeof fetch
  to satisfy stricter TS type narrowing
- vitest.setup: add global next-intl mock (useLocale, useTranslations,
  NextIntlClientProvider) so all test suites get i18n stubs without
  per-file boilerplate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -55,8 +55,11 @@ const makePrompt = (id: string, title: string): Prompt =>
     id,
     title,
     description: `Description for ${title}`,
-    category: "coding" as const,
+    category: "ideation" as const,
     tags: [],
+    author: "Test Author",
+    version: "1.0.0",
+    created: "2026-01-01",
     content: "test content",
     createdAt: "2026-01-01",
     updatedAt: "2026-01-01",
